title: alnus jorullensis var. castaneifolia
intro: Alnus jorullensis var. castaneifolia, also known as the Guatemalan alder, is a variety of the Alnus jorullensis plant, a species of alder tree native to Central America. The Guatemalan alder has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Alnus jorullensis var. castaneifolia include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
